title: 2025154 Dry544Lo
summary:
Main
• Global Market Turmoil Sours Dry Bulk Sentiment - Following the recent tariff announcements by the U.S. administration and the resulting volatility in global markets, sentiment in the dry bulk sector has also been affected , leading to a softening in spot rates-most notably in the key Capesize segment. While dry bulk imports into the US accounts for less than 1% of the global market, the broader economic slowdown that may result from the new tariffs presents some downside risk for the sector.
